category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/benjajaja/mdfried describes mdfried as a markdown viewer for the terminal.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes installation, key bindings, and configuration notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/benjajaja/mdfried; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include markdown and terminal graphics-related topics; README installation uses cargo.
